things.name: St Mark's Basilica
things.description: Byzantine masterpiece with golden mosaics and the famous bronze horses above the portal

things.name: Grand Canal Gondola Ride
things.description: Iconic waterway lined with Renaissance palaces, best experienced by gondola or vaporetto

things.name: Doge's Palace
things.description: Gothic seat of Venetian power with the Bridge of Sighs and prisons beyond

things.name: Rialto Bridge & Market
things.description: Iconic 16th-century stone bridge and the oldest market in Venice

things.name: Murano Island
things.description: Island famous for centuries of glass-blowing tradition with working demonstrations

things.name: Piazza San Marco
things.description: Napoleon's drawing room, the only piazza in Venice with the basilica and campanile

things.name: Peggy Guggenheim Collection
things.description: World-class modern art collection in the Palazzo Venier dei Leoni on the Grand Canal

things.name: Burano Island
things.description: Colourful fishing island famous for lace-making and multicoloured houses

things.name: Gallerie dell'Accademia
things.description: Venice's greatest art museum tracing the history of Venetian painting

things.name: Frari Church (Santa Maria Gloriosa)
things.description: Gothic masterpiece housing Titian's Assumption and the Pesaro altarpiece
